etymology.description: semantic 日(日) (rì, "sun") + phonetic 九(九) (jiǔ) -> rising sun
etymology.interpretation: The character 旭(xù, "rising sun; dawn") combines the semantic component 日(日) (rì, "sun"), suggesting brightness or a celestial body, with the phonetic component 九(九) (jiǔ), which contributes the sound. This combination conveys the sense of the sun rising, signifying dawn or the early morning.

examples.chinese: 天边露出了旭日(天邊露出了旭日)，空气显得特别清新(空氣顯得特別清新)。
examples.pinyin: Tiānbiān lùchūle xùrì, kōngqì xiǎnde tèbié qīngxīn.
examples.english: The rising sun appeared on the horizon, and the air felt especially fresh.

examples.chinese: 旭光渐渐照亮了大地(旭光漸漸照亮了大地)。
examples.english: The light of the rising sun gradually illuminated the land.

examples.chinese: 每天清晨，我们都会沐浴在旭日的光辉中(每天清晨，我們都會沐浴在旭日的光輝中)。
examples.pinyin: Měitiān qīngchén, wǒmen dōu huì mùyù zài xù rì de guānghuī zhōng.
examples.english: Every morning, we bathe in the glory of the rising sun.
